ddls:
CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was last updated */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text content of the message */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the message belongs */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the message was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the message (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL of any attachments related to the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES message_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES message_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the channel is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being assigned */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the responder to whom the message is assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, in progress, completed) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_assignments_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES responders ("responder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_assignments_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responders" (
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each responder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the responder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the responder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the responder */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the responder */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the responder's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("responder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responders_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_messages" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being responded to */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the responder who sent the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text content of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was sent */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL of any attachments related to the response */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_messages_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES responders ("responder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_messages_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being analyzed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the message belongs */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the message was sent */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the message */,
  "message_volume" INTEGER /* Number of messages in the same category and channel */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average time taken to respond to messages in the same category and channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_analytics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES message_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_analytics_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_analytics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES message_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message to which the tag is associated */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_tags_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission is associated */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_text" TEXT /* Text content of the template */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the template belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is active or deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_templates_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES message_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message being logged */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., message creation, response sending) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "responder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the responder who performed the activity (if applicable) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_logs_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_logs_responder_id FOREIGN KEY ("responder_id") REFERENCES responders ("responder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
